description: Input schema for Kling Video v2.6 Image-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired motion and action for the video.
examples: A woman smiling and waving at the camera.
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Reference image to animate. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
image.title: Image

cfg_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values follow the prompt more strictly.
cfg_scale.title: Cfg Scale

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to guide what to avoid in generation.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds.

title: AppInput
